name: island_animation
description: Segment a surface into color regions (islands), generate independent animated content for each region, and reproject them back onto the full projection canvas.

surface_image.description: URL or path to the prepared (darkened) projection surface image.

style_images.description: 1-6 style image URLs for TextureFlow content generation per island.

max_colors.description: Maximum number of color regions to segment. Default 8.

steps.description: Segment the surface image into distinct color-based regions (islands).
Generate animated content for each island region using the region mask as a diffusion mask. Repeat this step for each region in the segmentation output.
Reproject each island video back onto the full projection canvas at its original position. Repeat for each island.
